beats.reasoning: Sunday morning ritual—Shaan's been waking slower lately and savoring his coffee routine. Yesterday's low energy (50/100) suggests he needs an unhurried start to recharge.

beats.reasoning: Perfect sunny Sunday morning—ideal for a lakeside walk or jog. Green Lake is close-ish from Magnolia and fits his low-energy recharge vibe after yesterday's driving around.

beats.activity: Walk/run around Green Lake, enjoy the weather
beats.reasoning: 72-degree sunny Sunday with calm conditions—perfect for outdoor movement. Shaan's been running around a lot lately; a peaceful lakeside loop fits his need to decompress.
Yesterday he went to the farmers market and loved it—heirloom tomatoes, fresh basil, great vibe. Sunday morning is peak market time; natural repeat visit on a beautiful day.

beats.reasoning: Shaan enjoyed the farmers market Saturday morning so much he cooked with the ingredients. Sunday is another market day—he'll grab fresh items and linger, soaking up the community vibe.
Heading home with fresh market haul to prep lunch and settle in for a relaxed afternoon.

beats.reasoning: Shaan loves cooking with fresh market finds—yesterday he made pasta with tomatoes and basil and felt good about it. Another opportunity to slow down and eat well.

beats.activity: Work on side project, tinker with code
beats.reasoning: Shaan's been enjoying his side project in the evenings. A calm Sunday afternoon is perfect for focused, creative coding without work pressure—builds on his recent pattern.

beats.activity: Go for a walk or quick visit to a nearby park, enjoy the late afternoon sun
beats.reasoning: It's a beautiful 72-degree Sunday—Shaan should get outside again in the golden hour. Discovery Park is in Magnolia, so no commute needed. Fits the calm, recharge vibe.

beats.activity: Prepare and eat dinner, maybe with leftover farmers market ingredients
beats.reasoning: Another opportunity to cook something simple and good. Shaan's been finding satisfaction in that ritual—it's become part of his Sunday wind-down.

beats.activity: Relax at home—text friends, watch something, light coding or reading
beats.reasoning: Calm Sunday evening wind-down. Shaan's energy was low (50/100) yesterday, so an easy, unstructured evening at home lets him recover before the work week.
Sunday night rest—7 hours 15 minutes of sleep to start the work week refreshed. Spans overnight into Monday as required.

diary: Woke up to perfect weather and just knew I had to get outside. Made my usual coffee ritual at home, then drove over to Green Lake for a proper run. The path was busy but in that good way—everyone out enjoying the sun, energy was contagious. Grabbed my favorite spot at the farmers market in Ballard afterward. Found some gorgeous heirloom tomatoes and fresh basil, plus this incredible almond croissant that I probably didn't need but absolutely deserved. Lunch back home was simple but felt special using the market finds. Spent a couple hours on my side project—that weird authentication bug I've been wrestling with finally clicked into place. Walked through Discovery Park in the late afternoon when the light was all golden. Everything felt unhurried today. Ended the evening at home with friends texting, some low-key coding, just letting the day settle.
thought_process: I was genuinely energized by the weather forecast this morning—a 72-degree Sunday in Seattle is rare enough that I knew I had to maximize it. The run cleared my head, and the farmers market trip felt like a natural extension of that momentum rather than a chore. I chose to invest in good ingredients and actually cook rather than order something, which felt more intentional. The side project work came naturally after lunch when my mind was fresh. I think I was riding this contentment wave all day—no pressure, no deadlines, just choosing things that felt good. Discovery Park was the perfect capstone before I wound down. The whole rhythm felt aligned.
world_event_prompt: Calm, sunny Sunday, high of 72F. Quiet end-of-week day with no major disruptions. Lake Union sees heavy recreational boat and paddle traffic in the afternoon.
